case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. LAUREN HERRERA ET AL

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-18-2015 CONTINUED TO APR-22-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-22-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 57140333)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-02-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
